2158300.name: The Bakerville Case Demo
2158300.description:
PLAY THE BAKERVILLE CASE DEMO!
This is a demo released for Next Fest in February of 2025. The full game will change to reflect the feedback from the demo, however, the demo will not be updated with these changes.

The Bakerville Case Demo is now available.

• Remember to add the game to your wishlist •

STORY

The Bakerville Case is inspired by the true events of the secret 1950s "MK Ultra" program, to build a haunting and mysterious story that can be complemented as the player explores the playable environments.

You are Thomas Baker, a journalist who, after being contacted by an anonymous source, travels to a town to investigate a series of horrifying unknown events.

In a town located in North America called Bakerville, terror and evil wait to be found. According to the anonymous source, an unknown group is performing horrifying experiments on the people of the town, and the center point of all of it seems to be a nearby psychiatric hospital.

Thomas arrives in Bakerville to discover the terrifying mystery at the heart of the town, but he was never going to imagine what he would find in that place.

GAMEPLAY

The Bakerville Case combines elements of survival horror, psychological horror, exploration, and mystery, while incorporating roguelike-inspired mechanics such as challenging dungeon-like zones, resource management, high-stakes encounters where survival depends on strategic decision-making, and limited saving, where progress is only preserved at the end of each chapter, increasing tension and emphasizing careful resource management.

Unravel the mystery of this narrative adventure as you survive the fears that await you in Bakerville.
Explore the semi-open world, complete side activities, and find a way out of the nightmare.

Here's some of what you'll get to experience.

Gameplay.

• Variety of mechanics. Crafting, inventory management, combat, weapon upgrades, exploration, and more.
• Extensive story background. Find out what happened before Thomas arrived in Bakerville, figure out what's going on, and find a way out.
• Survive at all costs. Plan your moves, manage your resources well, and face the Tormented.
• Roguelike-inspired elements: High-stakes encounters where survival depends on strategic decision-making, and limited saving, where progress is only preserved at the end of each chapter, increasing tension and emphasizing careful resource management.

Free Trial: Content included.

• Full Part 1 of the main story
• Easy, Normal, Survivor and Nightmare difficulties
• 12 obtainable weapons
• 2 challenge zones
• 4 side quests
And much more...

Technical features.

• Realistic real-time graphics.
• Immersive and detailed environments.
• Wide variety of video and graphics settings such as textures, shadows, volumetric lighting, asset and texture streaming, and much more.
• Real-time ray tracing features such as Global Illumination, Reflections, and Ambient Occlusion (RT GTAO).
• NVIDIA DLSS and AMD FSR 2.2 support.
